roles.core: central bot, finance, licenses, PasarGuard owner integration, central Plisio invoices/callbacks, automatic USD-to-toman rate service, central APIs, D1 authority and report processor fallback
roles.edge: web panels, reseller bots, customer miniapps, reseller Plisio invoices/callbacks using the shared automatic USD-to-toman rate, latency-sensitive handling and immediate topic reports
roles.processor: report retries, topic repair, daily reports, backups and background jobs

features: fetch USD-to-toman rate automatically for Plisio invoices through the Navasan latest-rate API
configure the exchange-rate API key securely from the central Telegram bot
refresh the rate on demand, on invoice creation when stale, and from the Core scheduled handler
cache the last successful rate and keep using it during temporary provider outages
fall back to a manually configured central or reseller rate when no safe cached rate is available
share the central automatic rate with all reseller bots while preserving each reseller manual fallback
store the exact FX rate and source with every central and reseller Plisio invoice for auditability
allow configuring refresh interval and rate markup from the central bot
preserve signed Plisio callbacks, one-time wallet crediting, report topics and PasarGuard 5.1 API support

validation.javascript_syntax: passed for core, edge and processor
validation.fx_number_parsing: passed for Persian, Arabic and comma-separated digits
validation.navasan_response_parsing: passed for usd_sell.value in toman and rial conversion modes
validation.plisio_conversion: passed for central and reseller source_amount calculations
validation.rate_fallback: static assertions passed for fresh cache, stale cache and manual fallback paths
validation.invoice_audit: static assertion passed; exact FX rate/source is stored with each invoice
validation.live_rate_request: not run; no real Navasan API key was supplied
validation.live_plisio_invoice: not run; no live Plisio Secret Key was supplied
